message:
fix(mcp): sync builtin_workflows across surfaces; fix MCP import visibility and Rust 2024 compat

- mcp_helpers.rs: Add 3 missing handlers (HandleOnErrorCassSearch,
  HandleSwarmLearningIndex, HandleSessionStartContext) to builtin_workflows()
  so the helpers surface matches mcp.rs
- mcp.rs: Add HandleSessionStartContext; move 8 MCP types from #[cfg(test)]
  imports to non-test imports so submodules (mcp_missions, mcp_resources) can
  access them via use super:: (fixes E0432 unresolved import errors)
- mcp_missions.rs: Replace f.as_str() with *f for Rust 2024 str::as_str
  stability (fixes E0282 type inference errors)
- main.rs: Update robot_workflow_list test to expect 10 workflows with entries
  for handle_on_error_cass_search and handle_swarm_learning_index

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
